title: Thaalaattum Kaatre Vaa Lyrics Poovellam Un Vasam
stanzas: <div>Thaalaattum Kaatre Vaa Lyrics Poovellam Un Vasam

Thaalaattum kaatre vaa
thalaikoadhum virale vaa
tholaithoora nilave va
thodavendum vaane vaa

un chinna idhazh muththam
thinnaama en jenmam
veenendru povaeno

un vanna thirumaeni
seraamal en vayadhu
paalendru aaveno

un azhagu raajaangam
aalaamal en aavi
siridhaagi povaeno

en uyire neethano
en uyire neethano

Thaalaattum kaatre vaa
thalaikoadhum virale vaa
tholaithoora nilave va
thodavendum vaane vaa

Kannukkul kan vaithu
kanimaiyaal kan thadavi
chinnathoru singaaram
seiyyaamal poveno

paechizhantha vealaiyile
penazhage en maarbil
moochuvidum rasanaiyai
mugaraamal povaeno

un kattuk koondhal
nulaiyaama povaeno
adhil kalla thaenai
konjam parugaamal povaeno

nee paadhi thookkathil
pulambuvathai oli padhivu
naan seiyya maatteno(2)

nee oodal kondu aadum
pozhuthugalil adhai
unaku oliparappa maatteno

en uyire neethano
en uyire neethano

Thaalaattum kaatre vaa
thalaikoadhum virale vaa

orunaal oru pozhudhu
un madiyil naan irundhu
thirunaal kaanaamal
seththolindhu povaeno.

thalai ellaam pookkal poothu
thallaadum maram yaeri
ilai ellaam un peyarai
ezhuthaamal povaeno.

un padham vaangi nenjil
padhiyaamal povaeno
un panneer echchil
rusiyai ariyaamal povaeno

un udalai uyirvittu ponaalum
en uyirai unnodu paaicheno

un angam engengum uyiraai
nee vazhum varai
naanum vazhaeno.

en urimai neethano
en  urimai neethano

Thaalaattum kaatre vaa
thalaikoadhum virale vaa
tholaithoora nilave va
thodavendum vaane vaa

un chinna idhazh muththam
thinnaama en jenmam
veenendru povaeno

un vanna thirumaeni
seraamal en vayadhu
paalendru aaveno

un azhagu raajaangam
aalaamal en aavi
siridhaagi povaeno

en uyire neethano
en uyire neethano

enrichedMetadata.faq:
Frequently Asked Questions

What is the meaning of the song?

Thaalaattum Kaatre Vaa expresses deep romantic feelings and the longing for a loved one, capturing the essence of love and affection.

What is the plot context of the song in the movie?

In Poovellam Un Vasam, the song plays during a pivotal romantic moment, highlighting the emotional connection between the lead characters.

Who is the singer and music director of the song?

The song is sung by Shankar Mahadevan and composed by Vidyasagar, known for his melodious tunes.

When was the song released?

Thaalaattum Kaatre Vaa was released on August 17, 2001, and has since become a beloved classic.
enrichedMetadata.summary: In Thaalaattum Kaatre Vaa, the protagonist expresses his heartfelt emotions and longing for his beloved. The song beautifully encapsulates the theme of love and connection, making it a perfect backdrop for romantic moments in Poovellam Un Vasam. With its soothing melody and poignant lyrics, it evokes feelings of nostalgia and warmth. This enchanting track remains a favorite among fans of Tamil cinema, resonating with anyone who has experienced the joys of love.
enrichedMetadata.high_ctr_intro: Thaalaattum Kaatre Vaa from Poovellam Un Vasam is a mesmerizing romantic melody that captures the essence of love beautifully. With Shankar Mahadevan's soulful vocals and Vairamuthu's poignant lyrics, this song resonates with anyone who has experienced the magic of love. The collaboration of Vidyasagar's enchanting music adds a unique charm, making it a timeless classic.
stanzaMeanings: Come, breeze that sings, come, let the moon that shines brightly continue to shine.
Will I lose my life if I don't get to kiss your little lips?
Will my mouth be filled with milk if I don't get to touch your beautiful face?
Will my soul leave happily if I don't get to see your beautiful kingdom?
Are you my life, are you my life?
With my eyes, will I not be able to see the beauty without any adornment?
In the beautiful world, will the sweetness of my heart not fade away?
Will I not be able to leave without tasting a little honey from your curly hair?
Will I not be able to express the pain of your absence?
Will you not let me see the moments when you dance with anger?
Are you my life, are you my life?
Come, breeze that sings, come, let the moon that shines brightly.
One day, will I not be able to leave without seeing the festival from your lap?
Will all the flowers bloom and the trees grow without writing your name?
Will I not be able to leave without taking your footsteps in my heart?
Will I not be able to leave without knowing the taste of your sweet smile?
Even if your body leaves, will my soul still be with you?
As long as you live, will I also live?
Is my right yours, is my right yours?
Come, breeze that sings, come, let the moon that shines brightly continue to shine.
Will I lose my life if I don't get to kiss your little lips?
Will my mouth be filled with milk if I don't get to touch your beautiful face?
Will my soul leave happily if I don't get to see your beautiful kingdom?
Are you my life, are you my life?
